events.fact: Grandpa Bud builds a second cooking spit to increase food production efficiency.
Grandpa Bud discovers a beehive and obtains a Queen Bee and honey.
Grandpa Bud encounters and accidentally kills a two-star boar.
Grandpa Bud obtains a second Queen Bee after dismantling an abandoned structure.
Grandpa Bud confirms he has collected enough trophies to summon the first boss, Eikthyr.
Grandpa Bud discovers fish in the water for the first time.
Grandpa Bud successfully demonstrates a parry and stagger bonus against a Greydwarf using a wood shield.
Grandpa Bud officially enters the Black Forest biome for the first time.
Hugin the raven appears to provide information about the dangers of the Black Forest and the existence of the Trader.
Grandpa Bud builds a temporary shelter including a workbench, a sheltered campfire, and a bed.
Grandpa Bud reaches a milestone of 19 total deer hides, enough to begin crafting leather armor.
